intent: Pin the alignment helper contract: Top 3 vs maturity. Mismatch surfaces a warning; never mutates ranking. Control authority (CDE) decides.

cases.actual_outcome: verified by rankMaturityAlignment.test.ts:'aligned: Top 3 contains the lowest-maturity systems'

cases.description: Top 3 above lowest maturity (e.g. SEL is at level 0 but Top 3 is AEX/EVL/CDE at level 4).
cases.expected_outcome: ok=false; warning surfaced; Top 3 input order untouched.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by rankMaturityAlignment.test.ts:'mismatch: Top 3 above lowest ⇒ warning, but Top 3 unchanged' and 'does not mutate inputs even when warning is set'

cases.description: Top 3 references a system that has no maturity row (e.g. transient missing data).
cases.expected_outcome: ok=false (mismatch by missing data); warning surfaced; ranking unchanged.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by rankMaturityAlignment.test.ts:'Top 3 without maturity row ⇒ warning notes the missing data'

cases.description: Either Top 3 or maturity universe is empty.
cases.expected_outcome: ok=true (informational, not a control alarm); notes record what was empty.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by rankMaturityAlignment.test.ts:'empty Top 3 or empty maturity ⇒ ok=true with notes (not a mismatch)'

cases.description: Even when warning fires, helper MUST NOT mutate Top 3 array order.
cases.expected_outcome: input array order preserved; only the report is built.
cases.actual_outcome: verified by rankMaturityAlignment.test.ts:'does not mutate inputs even when warning is set'

fixes_applied.rationale: Read-only alignment evaluator that surfaces a warning when Top 3 sits above the lowest maturity. The helper does not mutate inputs and explicitly defers control authority to CDE.
Persists the alignment summary so red-team and reviewers can compare across runs.
